历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9296, 10977, 10678, 10779, and 11915 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 9300 and 11000 from 2021 to 2024, but significantly dropped to 11915 in 2025, a decrease of about 1136 positions compared to 2024, indicating a notable decline. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for Physics Category: 24 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 30 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 19 plus 6 for medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, both under Physics Category) totaling 25, a reduction of 5 (-16.7%) compared to 2025's 30, a significant contraction that may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with slight fluctuations between 86 and 92 in recent years, maintaining a stable mid-to-upper 211 level. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to incidents involving teacher ethics and conduct. It ranked 100th in Douyin university popularity, rated as average. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were recorded. The negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, the only A- or above discipline. Physics, Mathematics, and Computer Science did not enter the A tier, but as a normal university, it has a certain accumulation in basic science disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (highly recommended, 2025 heat_index 82.69), Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering (recommended) are socially popular majors. The university's Physics Category enrollment includes popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information Engineering, which strongly attract candidates. The total number of Gaokao registrants in the province for 2026 is approximately 218,700. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 146,000, an increase of about 20% compared to 2025's 121,443, intensifying competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, making it an out-of-province application for Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop in 2025 (+1136 positions), the notable enrollment contraction in 2026 (-16.7%), the increase in local Physics Category candidates (about +20%), the negative reputation, and the strong appeal of popular majors (Computer Science/Electronic Information), the contraction may push rankings forward, but the increase in total candidates and the inertia effect of the large ranking drop in 2025 exert pressure for further backward movement. Balancing these factors, the minimum ranking is expected to move forward slightly from the 2025 level of 11915 but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10774, with a range of 10274 to 11274.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University recruits separately for medicine in Gansu Province. In 2021, the lowest rank for science medicine was 9646 (planned enrollment 8). In 2022, no medicine data available. In 2023, only liberal arts nursing rank 2115 (not comparable to physics-based medicine). In 2024, the lowest rank for physics-based medicine was 10091 (planned enrollment 4). In 2025, the lowest rank for physics-based medicine was 15954 (planned enrollment 6). In 2026, the medicine enrollment plan remains at 6 (clinical medicine 4, preventive medicine 2), unchanged from 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the medicine rank shows a fluctuating downward trend (rank number increases), especially in 2025 with a significant drop of about 58% compared to 2024, reflecting a moderate easing of competition in medicine applications in this province.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a key university under the 211 Project and a national double first-class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. The university's medical department (formerly the Medical College) has a long history of running schools, with relatively outstanding medical strength among normal universities, and the clinical medicine major has a certain regional influence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medicine majors continue to maintain high application popularity in Gansu Province, with clinical medicine being particularly favored by candidates. Hunan Normal University only recruits two majors in medicine in Gansu: clinical medicine and preventive medicine, with a small enrollment scale (6 people), narrow major selection but relatively concentrated competition. Changsha, as a provincial capital in central China, has a certain appeal to Gansu candidates, but the long distance may affect some candidates' choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the predicted lowest admission rank for Hunan Normal University's medicine category in Gansu Province in 2026 is 15654, a slight rebound (rank number decreases by about 300) compared to 2025 (15954), reflecting a slight recovery in medicine popularity under the background of unchanged plans. The fluctuation range is 15254 to 16054.
